member.name: T:WatsonWebserver.Core.AccessControlManager
member.summary: Access control manager. Dictates which connections are permitted or denied.

member.name: P:WatsonWebserver.Core.AccessControlManager.Mode
member.summary: Access control mode, either DefaultPermit or DefaultDeny. DefaultPermit: allow everything, except for those explicitly denied. DefaultDeny: deny everything, except for those explicitly permitted.

member.name: M:WatsonWebserver.Core.AccessControlManager.Permit(System.String)
member.summary: Permit or deny a request based on IP address. When operating in 'default deny', only specified entries are permitted. When operating in 'default permit', everything is allowed unless explicitly denied.

member.name: F:WatsonWebserver.Core.AccessControlMode.DefaultPermit
member.summary: Permit requests from any endpoint by default.

member.name: F:WatsonWebserver.Core.AccessControlMode.DefaultDeny
member.summary: Deny requests from any endpoint by default.

member.name: T:WatsonWebserver.Core.AltSvcHeaderBuilder
member.summary: Builds Alt-Svc header values from explicit server settings.

member.name: M:WatsonWebserver.Core.AltSvcHeaderBuilder.Build(WatsonWebserver.Core.WebserverSettings)
member.returns: Alt-Svc header value, or null when disabled.

member.name: P:WatsonWebserver.Core.AltSvcSettings.Port
member.summary: Port advertised in Alt-Svc. A value of zero uses the primary server port.

member.name: T:WatsonWebserver.Core.ApiErrorResponse
member.summary: Structured API error response returned to clients when an error occurs.

member.name: P:WatsonWebserver.Core.ApiErrorResponse.Error
member.summary: The API result indicating the type of error.

member.name: P:WatsonWebserver.Core.ApiErrorResponse.StatusCode
member.summary: The HTTP status code derived from the error type.

member.name: P:WatsonWebserver.Core.ApiErrorResponse.Description
member.summary: Human-readable description of the error type.

member.name: P:WatsonWebserver.Core.ApiErrorResponse.Message
member.summary: Optional custom error message providing additional context.

member.name: P:WatsonWebserver.Core.ApiErrorResponse.Data
member.summary: Optional additional data associated with the error.

member.name: T:WatsonWebserver.Core.ApiRequest
member.summary: API request wrapper providing typed access to URL parameters, query parameters, headers, and the deserialized request body. Passed to API route handlers.

member.name: P:WatsonWebserver.Core.ApiRequest.Data
member.summary: The deserialized request body data. Null when using a non-generic route or when no request body was present.

member.name: P:WatsonWebserver.Core.ApiRequest.Http
member.summary: The underlying HTTP context providing full access to the raw request and response.

member.name: P:WatsonWebserver.Core.ApiRequest.Parameters
member.summary: URL path parameters with typed accessors. For a route like /users/{id}, access via Parameters["id"] or Parameters.GetGuid("id").

member.name: P:WatsonWebserver.Core.ApiRequest.Query
member.summary: Query string parameters with typed accessors. For a URL like /users?page=2, access via Query["page"] or Query.GetInt("page").

member.name: P:WatsonWebserver.Core.ApiRequest.Serializer
member.summary: Serialization helper for manual serialization and deserialization.

member.name: P:WatsonWebserver.Core.ApiRequest.AuthResult
member.summary: Authentication and authorization result. Populated when a structured authentication handler is configured.

member.name: P:WatsonWebserver.Core.ApiRequest.CancellationToken
member.summary: Cancellation token for the request. When request timeouts are enabled, this token will be cancelled when the timeout expires. Pass this token to async operations within your route handler to enable cooperative cancellation.

member.name: P:WatsonWebserver.Core.ApiRequest.Metadata
member.summary: User-supplied metadata. Populated from HttpContextBase.Metadata, typically set by an authentication handler.

member.name: M:WatsonWebserver.Core.ApiRequest.#ctor(WatsonWebserver.Core.HttpContextBase,WatsonWebserver.Core.ISerializationHelper,System.Object,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.param: Deserialized request body data, or null.
Cancellation token for the request. When timeouts are enabled, this token is cancelled on timeout.
member.exception: Thrown when ctx or serializer is null.

member.name: M:WatsonWebserver.Core.ApiRequest.GetData``1
member.summary: Cast the deserialized data to a specific type.
member.returns: The data cast to the specified type, or null if the data is null or not of the expected type.

member.summary: API result enumeration indicating the outcome of an API request. Each value maps to an HTTP status code.

member.summary: The credentials or session have expired.

member.summary: Access is denied implicitly (no matching rule found).

member.summary: Access is denied explicitly (a deny rule matched).

member.summary: User-supplied metadata from the authentication handler. This value is propagated to the route handler via ApiRequest.Metadata and HttpContextBase.Metadata.

member.summary: Returns true if the authentication was successful and authorization is permitted.

member.summary: Optional description providing context about the health status.

member.summary: Optional additional data about the health status.

member.summary: Configuration for the health check endpoint.

member.summary: URL path for the health check endpoint. Default is /health.

member.summary: When true, the health check endpoint requires authentication. Default is false.

member.summary: Optional custom health check delegate. When set, this delegate is called to evaluate the health status. When null, the endpoint always returns Healthy.

member.name: F:WatsonWebserver.Core.Health.HealthStatusEnum.Healthy
member.summary: The application is healthy and fully operational. Maps to HTTP 200.

member.name: F:WatsonWebserver.Core.Health.HealthStatusEnum.Degraded
member.summary: The application is operational but experiencing degraded performance or partial issues. Maps to HTTP 200.

member.name: F:WatsonWebserver.Core.Health.HealthStatusEnum.Unhealthy
member.summary: The application is unhealthy and unable to serve requests properly. Maps to HTTP 503.

member.name: T:WatsonWebserver.Core.Health.WebserverHealthExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for to enable health check endpoints.

member.summary: Enable a health check endpoint on the server. The endpoint returns HTTP 200 for Healthy/Degraded and HTTP 503 for Unhealthy.
member.param: Optional action to configure the health check settings.

member.name: T:WatsonWebserver.Core.Routing.ParameterRouteManager
member.summary: Parameter route manager. Parameter routes are used for requests using any HTTP method to any path where parameters are defined in the URL. For example, /{version}/api. member.param: The method that should be called to handle exceptions.

member.name: P:WatsonWebserver.Core.Routing.WebserverRoutes.AuthenticateApiRequest
member.summary: Structured API authentication handler. Returns an AuthResult indicating whether the request should proceed. When set, this takes precedence over AuthenticateRequest for authentication evaluation. On success, AuthResult.Metadata is propagated to HttpContextBase.Metadata. On failure, a 401 response with a structured ApiErrorResponse is sent automatically.

member.returns: A valid hostname, or null if the string contains no valid characters.
